task_completion.description: Identify the correct attendees (Engineering Leads and Marketing Manager) from Contacts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Odoo Contacts app being searched for 'Engineering' and 'Marketing', OR the specific names (David Chen, Luis Fernandez, Carol Martinez) being searched and selected in the Calendar attendee dropdown.

task_completion.description: Create a new event with the correct title and time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Odoo Calendar event creation modal showing the title 'Product Launch Kickoff' and the time set to 10:00 AM for a 2-hour duration, approximately two weeks in the future.

task_completion.description: Add the required attendees to the new event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event creation modal showing David Chen, Luis Fernandez, and Carol Martinez added to the Attendees field.

task_completion.description: Set the event location to 'Engineering Lab' and include an agenda in the description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The event creation modal showing 'Engineering Lab' (or containing 'engineering') in the Location field, and some text representing a launch agenda in the Description field.
The Odoo Calendar view showing the 'Product Launch Kickoff' event successfully saved and visible on the calendar grid.

task_completion.description: Cancel the existing 'Sprint Planning - Engineering' meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the 'Sprint Planning - Engineering' event being opened and deleted, or the calendar view showing that this event is no longer present during the target week.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo web interface using a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo application (http://localhost:8069), not terminal commands or API scripts (like curl) executing the changes.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely navigated the Calendar and Contacts modules.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Odoo menus, opening modals, and typing into fields, rather than just displaying a final success message.

integrity.description: The agent actually deleted the target event rather than just hiding it or renaming it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Sprint Planning - Engineering' event is shown being explicitly deleted via the 'Delete' button in the Odoo interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The new event must be named 'Product Launch Kickoff'. The event to delete is 'Sprint Planning - Engineering'. The required location must contain the keyword 'engineering' (e.g., 'Engineering Lab'). There must be exactly 3 required attendees added to the new event: David Chen and Luis Fernandez (Engineering Leads) and Carol Martinez (Marketing Manager). The agent represents Emma Thompson, Product Manager at Northbridge.
